headline: A Look At Aon (AON) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Why Aon (AON) is on investors’ radar today Aon (AON) is drawing attention after recent share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month and past 3 months while still carrying a value score of 4 and sizeable market capitalization. See our latest analysis for Aon.
